hooks.command: powershell.exe -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "Import-Module PSScriptAnalyzer; $j = [Console]::In.ReadToEnd() | ConvertFrom-Json; $f = $j.tool_input.file_path; if ($f -match '\.(ps1|psm1|psd1)$') { $results = Invoke-ScriptAnalyzer -Path $f -Severity Warning,Error; if ($results) { $results | Format-Table -AutoSize } }" 2>/dev/null || true
